evidence_quotes.quote: I believe that when someone buys a product, it should remain theirs indefinitelyunless it is clearly sold as a timelimited licence, with that duration stated up front.
Right now, this transparency is missing.

paragraphs.text: As a fellow EU citizen, I support the goals of this Act because they reflect my own values. I would, however, like to highlight the Stop Killing Games movement and the Stop Destroying Videogames European Citizens Initiative, which has already collected more than 1.4million signatures, and ask that their concerns be included here. The initiatives objectives align with the spirit of the Act. I believe that when someone buys a product, it should remain theirs indefinitelyunless it is clearly sold as a timelimited licence, with that duration stated up front. Right now, this transparency is missing. Gamesworks of artare being rendered unplayable through anticonsumer practices, effectively burning digital books. Please consider adding the protections sought by the Stop Destroying Videogames initiative to ensure these infringements are prevented.
